Table: MIRION Catalog - Photometry

Byte-by-byte Description of file: tab1.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes  Format Units Label  Explanation
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  4  I4     ---     ID        Source identification number
   6- 14  F9.5   deg     GLON      Galactic longitude
  16- 23  F9.5   deg     GLAT      Galactic latitude
  25- 31  F7.5   deg     MWPR	   MWP radius
  33- 39  F7.5   deg   e_GLON      Uncertainty in Galactic longitude
  41- 47  F7.5   deg   e_GLAT      Uncertainty in Galactic latitude
  49- 55  F7.5   deg   e_MWPR      Uncertainty in MWP radius
  57- 60  F4.2   ---     HRATE     MWP hit rate
  61- 68  F8.4   Jy      F8        Flux density at 8 microns
  70- 77  F8.4   Jy    e_F8        Uncertainty in flux density at 8 microns
  79- 85  F7.4   Jy      F12       Flux density at 12 microns
  87- 94  F8.4   Jy    e_F12       Uncertainty in flux density at 12 microns
  96- 102 F7.4   Jy      F24       Flux density at 24 microns
 104- 110 F7.4   Jy    e_F24       Uncertainty in flux density at 24 microns
 112- 120 F9.4   Jy      F70       Flux density at 70 microns
 122- 130 F9.4   Jy    e_F70       Uncertainty in flux density at 70 microns
 132- 133 I2     ---     N8        Number of photometric measurements at 8 microns
 135- 136 I2     ---     N12       Number of photometric measurements at 12 microns
 138- 139 I2     ---     N24       Number of photometric measurements at 24 microns
 141      I1     ---     N70       Number of photometric measurements at 70 microns
 143- 146 A4     ---   f_SAT       Saturation flag (1)
 148      I1     ---   f_MULTI     Multiple source flag (2)
 150- 153 A4     ---   f_NOSRC	   No clear source flag (1)
 155- 158 A4     ---   f_PCONF     Poor confidence in photometry (1)
 160      I1     ---   f_CEXT      Highly circular extended source (2)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note (1): Digits in flag correspond to 8, 12, 24, and 70 micron images left-right respectively.
Note (2): Flag is set if criteria is met in any band.
